experience.title: Vice President, Information Technology
experience.description: Represent Information Technology as a member of the senior leadership team with oversight of all tactical and strategic aspects of corporate IT systems.

experience.title: Director, IT Infrastructure
experience.description: Directly responsible for mission critical support of all computer, network, and telecom infrastructure.

experience.title: Manager, IT Operations - Windows
experience.description: Managed eleven person team of Help Desk Technicians, System Administrators, System Engineers, and System Architects.

experience.title: IT Manager - Networking, Systems, & Support
experience.description: Managed eight person team of Help Desk Engineers, Network Administrators, Network Engineers, and Telecommunications Administrators.

experience.title: System Administrator
experience.description: Solely responsible for mission critical support of 400+ Windows 95/98 workstations and 30 Windows NT 4.0 servers.

extra_fields.certifications: Denver Peak Academy - Lean Process Improvement (Black Belt), Harvard ManageMentor Leadership and Management (12 Courses), Microsoft Certified Systems Engineer (MCSE), Microsoft Certified Systems Administrator (MCSA), Cisco Certified Network Associate (CCNA), Citrix Certified Administrator (CCA)
